# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deployment Pipeline
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Building artifacts..."
          cp /path/to/deployment/scripts/* .

      - name: Archive build output
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: artifacts
          path: .

  deploy-staging:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: artifacts
          path: .

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging..."
          /path/to/deployment/scripts/ deploy-staging.sh

  deploy-production:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: artifacts
          path: .

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production..."
          /path/to/deployment/scripts/ deploy-production.sh
